summary: Top 6 +EV picks · NBA Playoffs (BOS-PHI · NYK-ATL · DEN-MIN) · live odds refresh

picks.reasoning: Maxey's median assist projection is 6.9, but variance is wide (p75 = 9.2). RI's +180 on Over 7.5 is a clear market outlier — Hard Rock has it at +135, BetRivers +123, DraftKings +120, Caesars +105. The model puts true probability at 42.7% vs RI's implied 35.7%, generating +19.5% EV. With Embiid in the lineup soaking up doubles and PHI playing from behind against the Celtics' top-3 defense, Maxey's pick-and-roll burden stays high. Easily the softest line on tonight's slate.

KAT median = 18.9 pts but the distribution is wide (p75 = 24.5). RI's +360 is the clear market best — Hard Rock FL/IL/OH at +350, FanDuel +320, BetMGM +300, Caesars +240. Implied prob at +360 is 21.7%; our model puts true at 24.9%, generating +14.3% EV. In a high-leverage opening playoff game, KAT's scoring variance — when you account for foul trouble blowups and 3PT explosions — easily clears 25 in roughly 1 in 4 games. RI is the place to take this number.

Embiid's median is 27.6 with σ ≈ 11.3 — an enormous spread. RI's +310 implies 24.4% probability while the model puts true probability at 27.1%, generating +10.7% EV. Among RI-available options this is one of the few full-game alt scoring lines where price beats fair value. PHI is a 6.5-pt home dog needing Embiid to be a monster, and his 35+ pt ceiling is very much in play in must-win playoff settings. Best NBA price for this line is +320 at bet365 — RI at +310 is right there.

Speculative alt-line dart, but a real +EV one at this price. Jokic's median is 9.9 assists with p75 = 12.6. RI's +800 implies 11.1% probability; our model puts true probability at 12.2%, generating +9.6% EV. Hard Rock IN/CO offers +850 — slightly better — but RI is competitive and DraftKings sits at +680 for context. In a 225-pt projected pace-up game, Jokic touching the ball every possession with shooters around him is exactly the script for 15+ assist nights. Note: correlated with Pick #6 — both cap on a Jokic dud night.

Stepped up to the alt line because the price is much better than the standard 29.5 number. Tatum p50 = 25.0 with σ ≈ 9.6 (p75 = 31.4). At +580, implied prob is 14.7%; the model puts true probability at 15.9%, generating +8.3% EV — which is materially better than the +4.9% EV on the Over 29.5 standard line. RI at +580 is competitive with the bet365 +650 outlier and well above Caesars +425, BetMGM +500, ParlayPlay +410. Tatum has a handful of 35+ pt postseason explosions on his résumé — small unit, big number.

The higher-probability companion to Pick #4 — pick one or take both knowing the correlation. Jokic Over 11.5 assists at RI's +210 implies 32.3%; the model puts true probability at 34.5%, generating +6.9% EV. RI's +210 is among the best market prices (BetMGM does not list 11.5; FanDuel +188; Hard Rock IN/CO +190). MIN will switch and trap to keep the ball out of Jokic's scoring spots, which only feeds his playmaking. A 12-assist night is well within his weekly range.
